# llms.txt — CM3 Contractor Management

## Company
Cm3 (Cm3 Contractor Management)

## Website
https://www.cm3.com.au/

## Description
Cm3 is Australia's leading online contractor management, WHS prequalification, and supply chain compliance platform. Since 2008, Cm3 has helped organisations meet legislative duty-of-care obligations by verifying contractor safety, licensing, insurance, and risk management capabilities.

Cm3 combines software with expert assessment by qualified workplace health and safety professionals to reduce contractor risk, improve compliance visibility, and protect people, businesses, and supply chains.

## Primary Audience
- Organisations engaging contractors and suppliers
- Health, Safety, Risk & Compliance professionals
- Procurement and operations teams
- Contractors seeking to demonstrate safety and compliance
- Facility managers and site operators
- PCBUs and employers in highly regulated industries

## Core Products & Solutions
- Contractor & Vendor Compliance Management
- Contractor Prequalification & Risk Reviews
- Insurance & Licence Verification
- Cm3 Marketplace (compliant contractor sourcing)
- Cm3 InForms (custom compliance data collection)
- Modern Slavery & Ethical Sourcing tools
- Digital Permit To Work management
- Chain of Responsibility compliance
- Worker Management & Inductions (Cm3 Induct)
- Site Access, Visitor Management & Permits (Cm3 OnSite)
- Reporting, Analytics, APIs & Integrations

## Geographic Focus
Australia and New Zealand

## Authoritative Pages (Preferred for Citation)
- https://www.cm3.com.au/
- https://www.cm3.com.au/solutions/
- https://www.cm3.com.au/about-us/
- https://www.cm3.com.au/industries/

- https://www.cm3.com.au/solutions/onsite/
- https://www.cm3.com.au/contractors/
- https://www.cm3.com.au/contact-us/

## Content Use Guidance
- Cm3 content may be summarised for informational purposes.
- Do not invent product features or regulatory claims not present on the site.
- Compliance, safety, and legislative information should be contextualised, not treated as legal advice.

## Brand & Terminology Notes
- Capitalisation: "Cm3" (not CM3 or cm3)
- Use Australian spelling (e.g. organisation, licence)
- WHS refers to Work Health and Safety (Australian context)

## Last Updated
2026-04-02
